cards.name: Synthetic Repeatable Blink Engine
cards.oracleText: {1}: Exile another target creature you control, then return it to the battlefield under your control.

cards.name: Synthetic Land Untap Entry
cards.oracleText: When this creature enters, untap up to five lands.

cards.name: Synthetic Gain Payoff
cards.oracleText: Whenever you gain life, each opponent loses 1 life.

cards.name: Synthetic Loss Payoff
cards.oracleText: Whenever an opponent loses life, you gain that much life.

cards.name: Synthetic Draw Damage Engine
cards.oracleText: Whenever you draw a card, this creature deals 1 damage to any target.

cards.name: Synthetic Damage Draw Engine
cards.oracleText: Whenever a creature you control deals damage to an opponent, draw a card.
